---
title: "Projects"
description: "Projects and experiments at the boundary of AI and cybersecurity."
listing:
  contents: projects/**/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        .side-others {
          position: absolute;
          top: 1.25rem;
          right: 1.25rem;
          z-index: 5;
          font-size: 0.85rem;
          border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
          border-radius: 10px;
          padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
          min-width: 180px;
          background: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
        }
        body.quarto-dark .side-others {
          border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
          background: rgba(42,42,53,0.6);
        }
        .side-others .side-others-head {
          text-transform: uppercase;
          letter-spacing: 0.08em;
          font-size: 0.7rem;
          font-weight: 600;
          color: #8888a0;
          margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
        }
        .side-others a {
          display: block;
          padding: 0.2rem 0;
          color: #4C4A98;
          text-decoration: none;
          border-bottom: none;
        }
        .side-others a:hover { color: #6361b3; }
        body.quarto-dark .side-others a { color: #b6b4f0; }
        body.quarto-dark .side-others a:hover { color: #d8d6f5; }
        @media (max-width: 991px) {
          .side-others { position: static; margin: 0 0 1.5rem auto; width: max-content; }
        }
      </style>
---

::: {.side-others}
::: {.side-others-head}
Others
:::
[📓 Open Compilations](open-compilations.html)
:::
